subject: Request for refund on cancelled order
body: I placed an order #12345 three days ago but had to cancel it due to change in plans. The order was cancelled within 2 hours of placement, but I haven't received my refund yet. The amount charged was $299.99. Can you please process the refund?
answer: Refund was processed successfully. The cancellation was within our 24-hour window, so full refund of $299.99 was initiated. Customer was informed that it takes 5-7 business days for the amount to reflect in their account depending on their bank. Provided refund reference number REF-2024-12345.

subject: Unable to access my account after password reset
body: I reset my password yesterday using the 'Forgot Password' link, but now I can't log in with the new password. I've tried multiple times and I'm sure I'm entering it correctly. The system just says 'Invalid credentials'. My email is john.doe@example.com.
answer: Issue was caused by browser cache storing old session data. Guided customer to clear browser cache and cookies, then try logging in again. Also sent a new password reset link as a precaution. Customer was able to log in successfully after clearing cache. Recommended using incognito mode if issue persists.

subject: Product delivered is different from what I ordered
body: I ordered a blue wireless mouse (SKU: WM-BLUE-001) but received a red wired mouse instead (SKU: WM-RED-002). The package has the correct order number, but the product inside is completely different. I need the correct item as soon as possible.
answer: Apologized for the warehouse error. Initiated immediate replacement shipment of the correct product (blue wireless mouse SKU: WM-BLUE-001) with express delivery at no extra cost. Provided prepaid return label for the incorrect item. Customer will receive correct product within 2 business days. Added $20 store credit as goodwill gesture.

subject: How do I change my subscription plan?
body: I'm currently on the Basic plan ($9.99/month) and would like to upgrade to the Premium plan ($29.99/month). I want to understand if I'll be charged immediately or if the change will take effect from my next billing cycle. Also, will I lose any data during the transition?
answer: Explained the upgrade process: customer will be charged prorated amount for remaining days in current billing cycle. Premium features activate immediately upon upgrade. Confirmed that no data will be lost during transition - all existing data, settings, and preferences are preserved. Provided step-by-step guide to upgrade via account settings. Customer successfully upgraded to Premium plan.

subject: Charged twice for the same order
body: I was charged twice for order #67890. My credit card statement shows two charges of $149.99 each on the same day (March 10th). I only placed one order and received one confirmation email. This appears to be a duplicate charge. Please investigate and refund the extra charge.
answer: Investigated the issue and confirmed duplicate charge due to payment gateway timeout that caused double processing. Immediately initiated refund for the duplicate charge of $149.99. Provided transaction ID for the refund. Customer was informed refund will appear in 3-5 business days. Added $15 account credit for the inconvenience. Escalated issue to payment team to prevent future occurrences.

subject: Request to update shipping address
body: I just realized I entered the wrong shipping address for my order #54321 which I placed 30 minutes ago. The order status shows 'Processing'. Can you please update the shipping address before it ships? New address: 456 Oak Street, Apt 3B, Seattle, WA 98101.
answer: Successfully updated shipping address in the system before order was dispatched to warehouse. Confirmed new address: 456 Oak Street, Apt 3B, Seattle, WA 98101. Sent updated order confirmation email with correct shipping details. Advised customer to double-check shipping address during checkout in future orders. Order shipped to correct address the next day.

subject: Product quality issue - item arrived damaged
body: I received my order today, but the laptop case I ordered has a large tear on the side and the zipper is broken. The outer packaging was intact, so this seems to be a manufacturing defect or damage that occurred before shipping. I need a replacement or refund. Order #78901.
answer: Apologized for receiving defective product. Reviewed order and photos provided by customer confirming damage. Immediately processed replacement shipment with expedited delivery. Provided prepaid return label for damaged item. As gesture of goodwill, applied 20% discount on next purchase and waived shipping fees. Customer received replacement in perfect condition within 3 days.

subject: Loyalty points not credited after purchase
body: I made a purchase of $500 last week (order #99887) and should have earned 500 loyalty points, but my account still shows the old balance. I've been a member of the rewards program for 2 years and this is the first time points haven't been credited automatically.
answer: Investigated loyalty account and found technical glitch that prevented points from being credited for purchases made between March 5-7. Manually credited 500 points to customer account. Also added bonus 100 points for the inconvenience. Confirmed total points balance and explained that issue has been resolved system-wide. Customer satisfied with resolution.

subject: Request for invoice with company details
body: I need an invoice for my recent purchase (order #11223) with my company's tax information included. Company name: Tech Solutions Inc., Tax ID: 12-3456789. This is for expense reimbursement purposes. The current invoice doesn't have these details.
answer: Generated new invoice with company details as requested. Invoice includes: Company name (Tech Solutions Inc.), Tax ID (12-3456789), itemized purchase details, and tax breakdown. Sent invoice via email in PDF format. Also updated customer account profile with company information for future purchases. Explained how to add company details during checkout for automatic inclusion in invoices.

subject: Promotional code not working at checkout
body: I'm trying to use the promotional code 'SAVE20' that I received via email, but it keeps saying 'Invalid code' at checkout. The email says it's valid until March 15th and I'm trying to use it today (March 11th). My cart total is $250. Can you help?
answer: Investigated and found that promotional code was case-sensitive and customer was entering 'save20' instead of 'SAVE20'. Explained the case-sensitivity issue. Also manually applied the 20% discount ($50 off) to customer's cart as a one-time courtesy. Customer completed purchase successfully. Suggested saving promotional codes in notes app to avoid typing errors. Feedback sent to marketing team to make promo codes case-insensitive.
